title: LLM Inference Audit Ledger
description: Cryptographic ledger tracking exact LLM inputs and outputs for legal defensibility.

run_id.description: UUID of the specific investigation run.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of inference generation.

model.description: The exact model string used (e.g., deepseek-chat, qwen3.5:9b).

parameters.description: Inference parameters used for this call (temperature, max_tokens, etc).

context_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the evidence manifest/state at the time of the prompt.

prompt_payload.description: The exact, fully hydrated JSON payload sent to the LLM API.

response_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the raw response received from the LLM API.

raw_response.description: The exact raw JSON response received from the LLM, or the raw string if parsing failed.
